message:
fix: clarify conservative velocity selection and warn on malformed feedback

forecast.rs: Rename best_velocity/best_label to slowest_velocity/
slowest_label to make the intentionally conservative velocity selection
explicit. The function picks the LOWEST label velocity for pessimistic
ETA estimation — this is by design, not a bug.

correlation.rs: Replace silent if-let-Ok JSON parse with match that
logs tracing::warn on malformed feedback JSONL lines. Previously,
corrupted lines were silently dropped during FeedbackStore::open,
making data loss invisible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
